name: scene-gaussian-map-alignment
summary: Guide scene-specific alignment of Gaussian/splat, USD/mesh, and robot map assets while keeping evidence labels honest.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill operates at the offline scene/map artifact boundary. It may prepare evidence for household-world runs, but alignment judgment and report labeling stay outside public robot capabilities until a stable MCP contract exists.

capability_requirements.notes: The workflow can consume B1/Map12-style assets, future Gaussian scene drops, Isaac render smoke artifacts, and exported robot map bundles.

scripts.summary: Reads readiness and navigation-smoke artifacts and emits a compact evidence-tier summary without making new alignment claims.

refactor_signals: multiple scene drops need the same deterministic transform or anchor matching code
manual evidence-tier decisions become repeatable enough to validate in tests
Gaussian rendering moves from inventory evidence into a stable renderer path
semantic anchor to USD object binding has a durable manifest format
promote_to_mcp_when: alignment inputs and outputs stabilize across scene providers
public/private artifact boundaries can be enforced in traces
multiple skills need the same online map-to-scene alignment capability
planner-backed evidence can be reported through one contract profile
